mapper.sql: id, user_id, level_type, score, correct_count, total_count, duration, details, create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE battle_record SET user_id = #{userId}, level_type = #{levelType}, score = #{score}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, total_count = #{totalCount}, duration = #{duration}, details = #{details} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT wr.rank_num AS rank_num, u.id AS user_id, u.username AS username, u.avatar AS avatar, wr.best_score AS best_score FROM ( SELECT agg.user_id AS user_id, agg.best_score AS best_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY agg.best_score DESC) AS rank_num FROM ( SELECT user_id, MAX(score) AS best_score FROM battle_record WHERE level_type = #{levelType} GROUP BY user_id ) agg ) wr INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = wr.user_id ORDER BY wr.rank_num ASC, wr.user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
